overview:
## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

A CMS message can contain arbitrary sets of certificates other than or in addition to those indicating the identity of signers. You can use this function to retrieve such certificates from a message. If the message was signed, it contains signer certificates. You can use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderGetNumSigners(_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderCopySignerCert(_:_:_:)] functions to retrieve the certificates for a specific signer.

You cannot call this function until after you have called the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderFinalizeMessage(_:)] function.

# CMSDecoderCopyAllCerts(_:_:)

**Function**

Obtains an array of all of the certificates in a message.

## Declaration

```swift
func CMSDecoderCopyAllCerts(_ cmsDecoder: CMSDecoder, _ certsOut: UnsafeMutablePointer<CFArray?>) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **cmsDecoder**: The CMSDecoder reference returned by the `CMSDecoderCreate` function.
- **certsOut**: On return, points to an array of `SecCertificateRef` objects. Returns `NULL` if the message does not contain any certificates (the message was encrypted but not signed); this is not considered an error. You must use the `CFRelease` function to free this reference when you are finished using it.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/security-framework-result-codes].

## Discussion

A CMS message can contain arbitrary sets of certificates other than or in addition to those indicating the identity of signers. You can use this function to retrieve such certificates from a message. If the message was signed, it contains signer certificates. You can use the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderGetNumSigners(_:_:)] and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderCopySignerCert(_:_:_:)] functions to retrieve the certificates for a specific signer.

You cannot call this function until after you have called the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/CMSDecoderFinalizeMessage(_:)] function.

## Related Documentation

- **CMSDecoderCopySignerCert(_:_:_:)**: Obtains the certificate of the specified signer of a CMS message.
- **CMSEncoderAddSupportingCerts(_:_:)**: Adds certificates to a message.
- **CMSDecoderGetNumSigners(_:_:)**: Obtains the number of signers of a message.
- **CMSDecoderCreate(_:)**: Creates a CMSDecoder reference.
- **CMSDecoderFinalizeMessage(_:)**: Indicates that there is no more data to decode.
